Our Process

The Art of Fine Tailoring

Expert Tailoring

Every shirt begins with precise measurements by master tailor Raza, ensuring a fit that moves beautifully with your body.

Premium Fabric

We source only the finest 100% cotton — breathable, soft, and built to last through years of confident wear.

Hand Finishing

Each collar, cuff, and button is hand-finished with meticulous care that machines can never replicate.

Quality Control

Every shirt passes through our rigorous 12-point inspection before delivery — flawless, every single time.

Free Alterations

Not perfect? We offer complimentary alterations until your shirt feels exactly right — no questions asked.

6-Day Delivery

From order to doorstep in just 6 days. Premium craftsmanship without the long wait.

Our Heritage

Our Story

"A shirt should feel like a second skin — effortless, confident, and uniquely yours."

Royal Suit was founded by Raza with a commitment to delivering premium custom shirts crafted with precision and care. Located in the heart of Laddhawala, Muzaffarnagar, we combine traditional tailoring expertise with modern style to create shirts that fit perfectly and make every customer feel confident.

Over 15 years of dedication have earned the trust of 500+ satisfied customers. Every shirt carries the legacy of fine craftsmanship — brought into the modern age with contemporary designs and meticulous attention to detail.

2009
Royal Suit founded in Muzaffarnagar
2015
Crossed 200 happy customers
2024
500+ customers, expanded fabric range
